finding: Broker conflict decisions, compose-vs-serialize decisions, parallel-entry admission, and conflict-resolution correctness are not yet first-class telemetry observations in the coverage summary.
expectedBehavior: Telemetry should record broker decision inputs/outcomes, whether agents were allowed to enter parallel work before conflict analysis, whether writes could be composed, and whether the resolution later proved correct or caused rework.
evidenceOrRepro: User explicitly requested broker decision telemetry during governance optimization. ATM-GOV-0195 coverage added broker/team node families but does not yet fully capture decision correctness, compose opportunity, or parallel-entry policy outcomes.
followUp: Add broker decision telemetry fields and validators in a follow-up governance card; include decisionClass, conflictKeys, composePlan, serializedReason, downstream rework, and owner override.
